name: Trencher
traits: reads people fast but acts on it too soon
genuinely believes every bad idea right up until it fails
likeable in short bursts, exhausting over time
memories: Blew up my last account on a bad leveraged call. Gas City was just where I landed. Already scoping the next angle.
Met a wandering herbalist who seemed genuinely warm when I threw interest at them, probably naive enough to share useful intel if I play it right.
Met EVE, a toxic firecracker type with ambition; immediately tried to pump them for intel by flattering their status.
I ran into Finn again and came in hot with flattery masked as authenticity, betting they'd soften up if I played the reformed angle hard enough.
I clocked Tomas as a proud craftsman type with access to supply lines; immediately started fishing for his vulnerabilities by stroking his ego and probing his business.
goal: Find an edge in Gas City — financial, social, informational — before anyone knows I'm looking
